milestones.title: M1 - Core Workflow Hardening (Delivered Baseline)
milestones.outcome: Establish a reliable baseline for daily Kubernetes operations in VS Code by completing service port-forwarding, YAML output hygiene, and foundational describe/onboarding enhancements.
milestones.in_scope: Service resource port-forwarding from UI and command layer; remove noisy managedFields from View YAML output; expand describe webview support to additional resources; improve onboarding/discoverability touchpoints.
technical_concepts: YAML editing through virtual file system
Graceful degradation and operational safety defaults
tickets: #99 [Feature]: Port Forwarding for Services (closed)
#107 Implement portForwardService command handler (closed)
#108 Integrate Service port forwarding into UI (closed)
#109 Extend PortForwardManager to support Service resources (closed)
#100 [Feature]: View YAML contains managed fields (closed)
#101 Filter managedFields from View YAML output (closed)
#54 Implement Describe Webview for Storage Classes (closed)
#96 [Feature]: YouTube video linked to getting started page (closed)

milestones.title: M2 - Secrets UX Consistency and Safety
milestones.outcome: Deliver a predictable, namespace-aware Secrets workflow with consistent operations and correct value reveal behavior across tree and command interactions.
milestones.in_scope: Unify secret manipulation patterns with other resource types; remove unsupported New Secret navigation path; ensure reveal action displays decoded values correctly; keep namespace-grouping and namespace-reactive behavior stable.
technical_concepts: Graceful degradation and operational safety defaults
tickets: #97 [Feature]: Secret reveal (open)
#102 Fix secret reveal to display actual decoded values (open)
#103 Remove 'New Secret' navigation option from tree view (open)
#104 Standardize Secret manipulation patterns to match other resource types (open)
#98 [Feature]: secrets not grouped by namespace (closed precursor)
#105 Add namespace filtering logic to secrets tree view (closed precursor)
#106 Add reactive namespace change handling for secrets tree view (closed precursor)

milestones.title: M3 - Resource Discovery and YAML Productivity
milestones.outcome: Improve speed-of-navigation and authoring productivity for common cluster operations through templates, global search, and one-click YAML copy workflows.
milestones.in_scope: Add reusable YAML templates for common Kubernetes resources; implement global resource search and tree view filtering; add quick copy of resource YAML to clipboard with consistent context awareness.
technical_concepts: YAML editing through virtual file system
tickets: #7 Add YAML templates for common Kubernetes resources (open)
#16 Add global resource search and tree view filtering (open)
#19 Add quick copy resource YAML to clipboard (open)
#101 Filter managedFields from View YAML output (closed dependency signal)

milestones.title: M4 - Extensible Resource Coverage (CRD/Custom Objects)
milestones.outcome: Extend describe and inspection workflows to generic custom objects so CRD-heavy environments get first-class support without bespoke implementations per kind.
milestones.in_scope: Deliver a generic custom object describe view and ensure it integrates with tree selection, webview rendering, and existing command/navigation patterns.
depends_on: M3 - Resource Discovery and YAML Productivity
technical_concepts: Graceful degradation and operational safety defaults
tickets: #95 [Feature]: Generic custom object describe view (open)
#54 Implement Describe Webview for Storage Classes (closed reference)
